name: Research Paper
description: Academic research paper blueprint with IMRaD structure (Introduction, Methodology, Results, Discussion). Suitable for journals and conferences.

sections.heading: Title
sections.content_hint: Paper title, author names, affiliations, email, abstract, keywords

sections.heading: Abstract
sections.content_hint: Concise summary of the research, typically 150-250 words

sections.heading: 1. Introduction
sections.content_hint: Background, problem statement, objectives, scope, paper organization

sections.heading: 2. Literature Survey
sections.content_hint: Review of existing work, gap analysis, theoretical foundation

sections.heading: 3. Methodology
sections.content_hint: Research methodology, algorithms, system design, experimental setup

sections.heading: 5. Discussion
sections.content_hint: Interpretation of results, comparison with existing work, limitations

sections.heading: 6. Conclusion
sections.content_hint: Summary of findings, contributions, future work

sections.heading: References
sections.content_hint: List of all cited references in APA format
